## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, reporting, and upcoming projects for HeyGen.](https://fathom.video/share/sQxUH1kE5VuD4Cxw8F4SyMEnzKQ7_3fx?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [93 articles live, 10 more in process; tool directory progress hindered by missing customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/sQxUH1kE5VuD4Cxw8F4SyMEnzKQ7_3fx?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Blog performance metrics show impressive growth; need to refine reporting by content categories](https://fathom.video/share/sQxUH1kE5VuD4Cxw8F4SyMEnzKQ7_3fx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Two major reports planned for Q1 2025: AI sentiment survey (Jan 7) and AI trends report (Jan 20)](https://fathom.video/share/sQxUH1kE5VuD4Cxw8F4SyMEnzKQ7_3fx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [New feature release: programmatic video podcast generation from URL/PDF, offering SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/sQxUH1kE5VuD4Cxw8F4SyMEnzKQ7_3fx?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
